features.featureTitle: In the Admin Dashboard (frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx), add a 'Manage Admins' section visible only to owner-role users. This section should display a form with a text input for a principal ID and a 'Grant Admin Role' button that calls the backend `grantAdminRole` function. Show a success or error message after the operation. Include a helper note in the UI explaining that the principal ID must be obtained from the user's Internet Identity login session.
